metrics.description: The sum USD value of all miner revenue, which constitutes fees plus newly issued native units, represented as the US dollar amount earned if all native units were sold at the closing price on the same day.

values_schema.revenue_usd: The sum USD value of all miner revenue during the specified time interval

metrics.description: The mean difficulty of finding a hash that meets the protocol-designated requirement (i.e., the difficulty of finding a new block) that interval. The requirement is unique to each applicable cryptocurrency protocol.

values_schema.mean_difficulty: The mean difficulty during the specified interval. A higher difficulty indicates a lower likelihood of finding a hash which meets the protocol-requirement of finding a new block.

metrics.description: The mean size (in bytes) of all blocks created

values_schema.block_count: The mean size (in bytes) of all blocks created during the specified interval.

metrics.description: The annualized standard-deviation of daily returns over a window of time

values_schema.volatility_30d: The asset's volatility calculated over the last 30 days of daily returns
values_schema.volatility_90d: The asset's volatility calculated over the last 90 days of daily returns
values_schema.volatility_1yr: The asset's volatility calculated over the last 1 year of daily returns
values_schema.volatility_3yr: The asset's volatility calculated over the last 3 years of daily returns

metrics.description: The USD value of the mean fee per transaction.

values_schema.mean_fee: The USD value of the mean fee per transaction that interval.

metrics.description: The sum USD value withdrawn from exchanges that interval, including exchange to exchange activity.

values_schema.flow_out_usd: The sum USD value withdrawn from exchanges that interval, including exchange to exchange activity.

metrics.description: The number of subscribers on the asset's primary subreddit

values_schema.subscribers: The number of subscribers on the asset's primary subreddi

metrics.description: The sum USD value of all native units transferred (i.e., the aggregate size in USD of all transfers).

values_schema.transaction_volume_usd: The sum USD value of all native units transferred between distinct addresses during the specified interval.

metrics.description: The sum USD value of all fees paid to miners that interval. Fees do not include new issuance.

values_schema.fees_total_usd: The sum USD value of all fees paid to miners that interval.

metrics.description: The sum of all miner revenue, which constitutes fees plus newly issued native units.

values_schema.revenue_native: The sum of all miner revenue, which constitutes fees plus newly issued native units.

metrics.description: The sum of new native units issued that interval. Only those native units that are issued by a protocol-mandated continuous emission schedule are included (i.e., units manually released from escrow or otherwise disbursed are not included).

values_schema.issuance_native: The sum of new native units issued that interval.

metrics.description: The median transfer value in US dollars.

values_schema.median_transfer_value_usd: The median transfer value in US dollars.

metrics.description: The sum count of transfers that interval. Transfers represent movements of native units from one ledger entity to another distinct ledger entity. Only transfers that are the result of a transaction and that have a positive (non-zero) value are counted.

values_schema.transfers_count: The sum count of transfers that interval

metrics.description: The sum USD value based on the USD closing price on the day that a native unit last moved (i.e., last transacted) for all native units.

values_schema.marketcap_realized: The sum USD value based on the USD closing price on the day that a native unit last moved (i.e., last transacted) for all native units.

metrics.description: The amount of the asset withdrawn from exchanges that interval, excluding exchange to exchange activity.

values_schema.flow_out: The amount of the asset withdrawn from exchanges that interval, excluding exchange to exchange activity.

metrics.description: The sum USD value of native units transferred divided by the count of transfers (i.e., the mean "size" in USD of a transfer).

values_schema.average_transfer_value_usd: The sum USD value of native units transferred divided by the count of transfers that interval.

metrics.description: The circulating marketcap is the price of the asset multiplied by the circulating supply. If no price is found for an asset because no trades occurred, the last price of the last trade is used. After 30 days with no trades, a marketcap of 0 is reported until trading resumes.

values_schema.circulating_marketcap: The circulating marketcap in US dollars.

metrics.description: The marketcap dominance is the asset's percentage share of total crypto circulating marketcap
The sum of the size (in bytes) of all blocks created each day

values_schema.block_count: The sum of the size (in bytes) of all blocks created during the specified interval.

metrics.description: The circulating supply acknowledges that tokens may be held by projects/foundations which have no intent to sell down their positions, but which have not locked up supply in a formal contract. Thus, circulating supply does not include known project treasury holdings (which can be significant). Note that an investor must carefully consider both liquid and circulating supplies when evaluating an asset, and the two can vary significantly. A risk of depending entirely on circulating supply is that the number can change dramatically based on discretionary sales from project treasuries.

values_schema.circulating_supply: The circulating supply of the asset is the total supply of the asset not locked into legal contracts, smart contracts, or held in treasury wallets.

metrics.description: The sum USD value sent to exchanges that interval, excluding exchange to exchange activity.

values_schema.flow_in_usd: The sum USD value sent to exchanges that interval, excluding exchange to exchange activity.

metrics.description: Volume weighted average price computed using Messari Methodology

values_schema.open: The price of the asset at the beginning of the specified interval in US dollars.
values_schema.high: The highest price of the asset during the specified interval in US dollars.
values_schema.low: The highest price of the asset during the specified interval in US dollars
values_schema.close: The price of the asset at the end of the specified interval in US dollars.
values_schema.volume: The total volume traded during the specified interval across all Messari method markets in US dollars

metrics.description: The sum USD value of new native units issued that interval. Only those native units that are issued by a protocol-mandated continuous emission schedule are included (i.e., units manually released from escrow or otherwise disbursed are not included).

values_schema.issuance_usd: The sum USD value of new native units issued that interval

metrics.description: The number of active users on the asset's primary subreddit

values_schema.active_users: The number of active users on the asset's primary subreddit

metrics.description: The sum of all fees paid to miners in native units. Fees do not include new issuance.

values_schema.fees_total: The sum of all fees paid to miners in native units

metrics.description: The mean rate at which miners are solving hashes that interval.

values_schema.hash_rate: Hash rate is the speed at which computations are being completed across all miners in the network. The unit of measurement varies depending on the protocol.

metrics.description: The amount of the asset sent to exchanges that interval, excluding exchange to exchange activity.

values_schema.flow_in: The amount of the asset sent to exchanges that interval, excluding exchange to exchange activity.

metrics.description: The sum USD value withdrawn from exchanges that interval, excluding exchange to exchange activity.

values_schema.flow_out_usd: The sum USD value withdrawn from exchanges that interval, excluding exchange to exchange activity.

metrics.description: Volume weighted average price over Bitwise 10 exchanges.

values_schema.open: The price of the asset at the beginning of the specified interval in US dollars.
values_schema.high: The highest price of the asset during the specified interval in US dollars.
values_schema.low: The highest price of the asset during the specified interval in US dollars
values_schema.close: The price of the asset at the end of the specified interval in US dollars.
values_schema.volume: The total volume traded during the specified interval across all Bitwise exchange markets in US dollars

metrics.description: The percentage of new native units (continuous) issued over that interval, extrapolated to one year (i.e., multiplied by 365), and divided by the current supply at the end of that interval. Also referred to as the annual inflation rate.

values_schema.issuance_rate: The percentage of new native units (continuous) issued over that interval.

metrics.description: The Sharpe ratio (performance of the asset compared to a "risk-free" asset) over a window of time)

values_schema.sharpe_30d: The asset's Sharpe ratio calculated over the last 30 days of daily returns
values_schema.sharpe_90d: The asset's Sharpe ratio calculated over the last 90 days of daily returns
values_schema.sharpe_1yr: The asset's Sharpe ratio calculated over the last 1 year of daily returns
values_schema.sharpe_3yr: The asset's Sharpe ratio calculated over the last 3 years of daily returns

metrics.description: The amount of the asset sent to exchanges that interval, including exchange to exchange activity.

values_schema.flow_in: The amount of the asset sent to exchanges that interval, including exchange to exchange activity.

metrics.description: The amount of the asset withdrawn from exchanges that interval, including exchange to exchange activity.

values_schema.flow_out: The amount of the asset withdrawn from exchanges that interval, including exchange to exchange activity.

metrics.description: The sum USD value sent to exchanges that interval, including exchange to exchange activity.

values_schema.flow_in_usd: The sum USD value sent to exchanges that interval, including exchange to exchange activity.

metrics.description: The sum of all native units held in hot or cold exchange wallets

values_schema.supply_usd: The sum all native units held in hot or cold exchange wallets

metrics.description: The USD value of the median fee per transaction.

values_schema.median_fee: The USD value of the median fee per transaction that interval.

metrics.description: The sum USD value of all native units held in hot or cold exchange wallets

values_schema.supply_usd: The sum USD value of all native units held in hot or cold exchange wallets

metrics.description: The sum count of unique addresses that were active in the network (either as a recipient or originator of a ledger change) that interval. All parties in a ledger change action (recipients and originators) are counted. Individual addresses are not double-counted.

values_schema.active_addresses: The sum count of unique addresses that were active in the network.

metrics.description: It is well known that many exchanges conduct wash trading practices in order to inflate trading volume. They are incentivized to report inflated volumes in order to attract traders. "Real Volume" refers to the total volume on the exchanges that we believe with high level of confidence are free of wash trading activities. However, that does not necessarily mean that the volume reported by other exchanges is 100% wash trades. As such, the Messari "Real Volume" applies a penalty to these exchanges to discount the volume believed to come from wash trading activity. For more information, see our methodology page.

values_schema.volume: The total volume traded during the specified interval across all Messari method markets in US dollars

metrics.description: It is well known that many exchanges conduct wash trading practices in order to inflate trading volume. They are incentivized to report inflated volumes in order to attract traders. "Bitwise Volume" refers to the total volume over 10 exchanges identified by Bitwise to be free of wash trading activities. They tend to be regulated exchanges. However, that does not necessarily mean that the volume reported by other exchanges is 100% wash trades. As such, the Bitwise Volume underestimates the total volume.

values_schema.volume: The total volume traded during the specified interval across all Messari method markets in US dollars

metrics.description: The sum USD value of all native units transferred removing noise and certain artifacts.

values_schema.adjusted_transfer_value_usd: The USD value of the sum of native units transferred removing noise and certain artifacts.

metrics.description: The sum count of blocks created each day

values_schema.block_count: The sum count of blocks created that interval that were included in the main (base) chain.

metrics.description: The sum count of transactions that interval. Transactions represent a bundle of intended actions to alter the ledger initiated by a user (human or machine). Transactions are counted whether they execute or not and whether they result in the transfer of native units.

values_schema.transaction_count: The sum count of transactions during the specified interval

metrics.description: The ratio of the network value (or market capitalization, current supply) divided by the adjusted transfer value. Also referred to as NVT.

values_schema.nvt_adjusted: The ratio of the network value (or market capitalization, current supply) divided by the adjusted transfer value
